title: Mid-Level Visual Merchandiser at More Retail Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Visual Merchandiser at More Retail Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
More Retail Digital Technologies invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Visual Merchandiser at our Faridabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About More Retail Digital Technologies:
More Retail Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with More Retail Digital Technologies!
